title: Instant PvP
description:
Instant PvP | Merge 1.8 and 1.9 combat mechanics together!
No delay between hits!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_cs06NdFHiY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**No delay between hits anymore**, just like 1.8!

You can still use the offhand, shields, crossbows, etc… and any other mechanic after 1.8

**Multiplayer** Compatible!

## Axes:

**Axes** have been nerfed back to their **original 1.8 damage** *(with the exception of netherite axe obviously)*:

- Wooden Axe: *3*
- Golden Axe: *3*
- Stone Axe: *4*
- Iron Axe: *5*
- Diamond Axe: *6*
- Netherite Axe: *7*

## Blocking

You can now block with any sword, just like 1.8!

Blocking reduces any attack damage towards the player by 40% and reduces the knock-back in half

## Enabling/disabling the mechanic with a simple command!

Do **NOT** use */datapack disable* without first disabling the 1.8 mechanic!

**Enable (is on by default)**

```jsx
/function instant_pvp:enable
```

**Disable**

```jsx
/function instant_pvp:disable
```

Switching between the two will automatically:

- Change the attack speed of players
- Enable/Disable the blocking ability of swords
- Change the damage dealt by axes.
